raw_entries.text: Match ends, Mexico 1, Korea Republic 0.
Second Half ends, Mexico 1, Korea Republic 0.
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Lee Gi-Hyuk.
Attempt blocked. Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross.
Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Johan Vásquez.
Attempt missed. Oh Hyeon-Gyu (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross following a corner.
Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Israel Reyes.
Attempt missed. Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross following a corner.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic) header from very close range is saved in the centre of the goal by Raúl Rangel (Mexico). Assisted by Eom Ji-Sung with a cross.
Attempt saved. Yang Hyun-Jun (Korea Republic) left footed shot from very close range is saved in the bottom right corner by Raúl Rangel (Mexico).
Delay in match because of an injury Raúl Rangel (Mexico).
Attempt saved. Obed Vargas (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Orbelín Pineda.
Substitution, Mexico. César Huerta replaces Julián Quiñones.
Foul by Israel Reyes (Mexico).
Hwang Hee-Chan (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Mexico. Israel Reyes replaces Roberto Alvarado.
Substitution, Mexico. Santiago Giménez replaces Raúl Jiménez.
Attempt missed. Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Hwang Hee-Chan.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Cho Gue-Sung replaces Paik Seung-Ho.
Offside, Korea Republic. Yang Hyun-Jun is caught offside.

Attempt saved. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Julián Quiñones with a cross.
Foul by Raúl Jiménez (Mexico).
Eom Ji-Sung (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Yang Hyun-Jun (Korea Republic).
Substitution, Mexico. Orbelín Pineda replaces Brian Gutiérrez.
Substitution, Mexico. Obed Vargas replaces Luis Romo.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Eom Ji-Sung replaces Kim Moon-Hwan.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Yang Hyun-Jun replaces Seol Young-Woo.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic).
Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Korea Republic. Seol Young-Woo is caught offside.
Attempt blocked. Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Paik Seung-Ho (Korea Republic).
Paik Seung-Ho (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Julián Quiñones (Mexico).
Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Hwang Hee-Chan replaces Lee Jae-Sung.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Oh Hyeon-Gyu replaces Son Heung-Min.
Offside, Mexico. Julián Quiñones is caught offside.
Handball by Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico).
Attempt blocked. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Julián Quiñones with a cross.
Goal! Mexico 1, Korea Republic 0. Luis Romo (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Attempt missed. Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) left footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Brian Gutiérrez.
Second Half begins Mexico 0, Korea Republic 0.
First Half ends, Mexico 0, Korea Republic 0.
Foul by Érik Lira (Mexico).
Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Jorge Sánchez (Mexico).
Lee Jae-Sung (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.
Attempt blocked. Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Son Heung-Min.
Attempt missed. Seol Young-Woo (Korea Republic) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is high and wide to the left.
Foul by Jesús Gallardo (Mexico).
Offside, Mexico. Roberto Alvarado is caught offside.
Offside, Korea Republic. Lee Jae-Sung is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a cross.
Julián Quiñones (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Mexico. Jorge Sánchez is caught offside.
Offside, Korea Republic. Son Heung-Min is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right.
Attempt missed. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Luis Romo.
Luis Romo (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic).
Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic).
First Half begins.
Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
